name: claude-model-proxy
description: Routes Claude Desktop gateway requests to Ollama Cloud, HuggingFace Inference Router, DeepSeek, Moonshot/Kimi, GLM, Xiaomi MiMo, OpenAI, Gemini, Qwen, or Anthropic upstreams. Includes smart fallbacks so Claude Desktop's internal Haiku/Sonnet/Opus calls work without an Anthropic key.
long_description: Starts a local HTTP proxy for Claude Desktop's gateway feature. Requests are routed by model name: claude-ollama-* aliases use Ollama Cloud (Turbo), claude-hf-* aliases use HuggingFace Inference Router (which auto-routes to Together, Fireworks, HF Inference, Hyperbolic, SambaNova, Novita, Nebius), claude-deepseek-* use DeepSeek, claude-kimi-* uses Moonshot/Kimi, claude-glm-* uses Z.AI, claude-mimo-* uses Xiaomi MiMo, claude-gpt-* uses OpenAI, claude-gemini-* uses Gemini, claude-qwen-* uses Qwen/DashScope, and the original Claude model names use Anthropic Messages. Date-suffixed Claude model names (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) that Claude Desktop emits internally are auto-resolved to a configurable Ollama / HuggingFace fallback when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty. Handles /v1/messages, /v1/messages/count_tokens, and /v1/models. The installer asks only for the keys you'll actually use; everything else stays in the optional advanced JSON field.

tools.name: model_proxy_status
tools.description: Shows whether the local model-name proxy is running and how models are routed.

initialize.instructions: This extension keeps a local model-name proxy running for Claude Desktop gateway requests. Use model_proxy_status to inspect runtime URL, provider key flags, and model routes.

tools.name: model_proxy_status
tools.title: Model proxy status
tools.description: Shows local proxy status, upstream providers, and model mappings.

base_url.title: Gateway Base URL
base_url.description: The URL Claude Desktop calls. Leave on the local loopback default unless you've configured DNS/TLS for a custom domain.

port.title: Local Proxy Port
port.description: Local port the proxy listens on.

default_provider.title: Default Provider
default_provider.description: Fallback provider for any model not in the routing table. For Ollama-only setups use 'ollama'. Valid values: ollama, deepseek, moonshot, glm, xiaomi, openai, gemini, qwen, anthropic.

ollama_base_url.title: Ollama Cloud Base URL
ollama_base_url.description: Ollama Cloud OpenAI-compatible base URL. Default points at hosted Ollama Cloud (Turbo) — no local Ollama install required.

ollama_api_key.title: Ollama Cloud API Key
ollama_api_key.description: OLLAMA_API_KEY from https://ollama.com/settings/keys. Sent only to Ollama Cloud.

huggingface_base_url.title: HuggingFace Router Base URL
huggingface_base_url.description: HuggingFace Inference Router OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Default points at hosted HF Router, which auto-routes to Together, Fireworks, HF Inference, Hyperbolic, SambaNova, Novita, or Nebius.

huggingface_api_key.title: HuggingFace API Token
huggingface_api_key.description: HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY from https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens (read access is enough). Sent only to HuggingFace Router. Leave blank if you aren't using claude-hf-* models.

claude_haiku_model.title: Claude Haiku Fallback Alias
claude_haiku_model.description: Claude alias to use when Claude Desktop asks for any claude-haiku-* model (including dated names like claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty. Defaults to a small, fast Ollama Cloud model.

claude_sonnet_model.title: Claude Sonnet Fallback Alias
claude_sonnet_model.description: Claude alias to use when Claude Desktop asks for any claude-sonnet-* model and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty.

claude_opus_model.title: Claude Opus Fallback Alias
claude_opus_model.description: Claude alias to use when Claude Desktop asks for any claude-opus-* model and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty.

deepseek_base_url.title: DeepSeek Base URL
deepseek_base_url.description: DeepSeek Anthropic-compatible API base URL. Leave blank if you aren't using DeepSeek.

moonshot_base_url.title: Moonshot Base URL
moonshot_base_url.description: Moonshot/Kimi Anthropic-compatible base URL. Leave blank if you aren't using Moonshot.

advanced_env.title: Optional Advanced Settings JSON
advanced_env.description: JSON object for less common provider keys and overrides — e.g. {"GLM_API_KEY":"...","XIAOMI_API_KEY":"...","ANTHROPIC_API_KEY":"sk-ant-...","OPENAI_API_KEY":"sk-...","GEMINI_API_KEY":"...","QWEN_API_KEY":"sk-...","DEBUG_PROXY":"true"}. Same keys as the env vars listed in README.
